meaning: n.[动]翅上有细纹的蝶,灰蝶科
examples: But by the fifth year of restoration, the Edwards hairstreak butterfly was everywhere on the site.
The scales on its upper wings are blue, so giving it its alternative name, the Great blue Hairstreak (GBH to his friends, which stands for Grievous Bodily Harm in the UK!)
The green hairstreak was down by 68% and the white-letter hairstreak down 71%.
Matthew Oates, from the National Trust, has been monitoring purple hairstreak butterfly eggs at Flisteridge Wood near Malmesbury for eight years.
The black hairstreak, one of the UK's rarest butterflies, did badly.
